author: claude
text:
display: foundation module for CLI overhaul

Provides use_color/use_unicode detection (NO_COLOR, CLICOLOR, TTY, --plain),
prio_dot, status_glyph/word, claimed/deps/gates badges, and tree_prefix
primitives. Picks owo-colors for zero runtime deps. Adds a global --plain
CLI flag threaded through a OnceLock set in main. JSON paths bypass this
module; machine contract unchanged. 100% line coverage; all tests green.
